data.name: The medical examination diary: Teamwork in Paradise.
data.detailed_description:
The story of "The medical examination diary: Teamwork in Paradise."

changes depending on the choices you make,

It is a novel game with multiple endings.

The illustrator [Moneti] draws the story,

Please enjoy your days of practical training with these two beautiful girls.

If you can keep them in a good mood,

a special development may be waiting for you. ......?

Feature

  • Multiple endings with choices

  • Smooth character animation via the E-mote system

  • reathtaking FHD illustrations

Story

How long has it been since I started my residency at Amagi University Hospital?

After completing three months of training in the orthopedics department,

where I was first assigned, I spent six months in the internal medicine department,

where I was next assigned.

I also successfully completed three months in emergency medicine and anesthesiology,

and was able to get through the first year of my initial training.

Perhaps I, Takuya Shirasawa, am blessed.

My childhood friend Mio Akagi was working as a nurse in the orthopedic surgery department.

Although I was unfamiliar with the life of a resident, thanks to Mio,

I think I got off to a good start.

Furthermore, Ryo Amagi, who was my senior at university in internal medicine.

He was my senior in internal medicine at the university,

Ryo Amagi, a.k.a. Oryo-senpai, served as my supervisor.

Thanks to his guidance,

I was able to get through my training in internal medicine without much trouble.

Well, was it a reaction to the fact that the orthopedics and internal medicine were going well?

I was unimaginably busy in the emergency and anesthesiology departments. ......

Shirasawa's next internship was in obstetrics and gynecology.

In pursuit of his dream of becoming a pediatrician,

What awaits him in the next step of his training?

While being bewildered by the new environment,

a new training program is about to begin.

Character

Mio Aakagi CV:Ono Ryouko

She is good natured, serious, cheerful and accurate.

She and the main character are childhood friends.

She struggles to help the main character, Shirasawa,

with his unfamiliar training, but she also has a clumsy side.

She kindly offers to help him with his practical training,

but something terrible happens. ......

Ryo Amagi CV:Fujisawa Reika

She was the protagonist's senior in college.

She is also the niece of the president of Amagi University Hospital.

She is a caring and reliable female doctor,

but she shows a sadistic side to the main character, Shirasawa.

And in this practical training,

she also gives him some harsh guidance. ......

Takuya Shirasawa

The protagonist of the film.

data.short_description: "The medical examination diary: Teamwork in Paradise." is a novel game. Enjoy new episodes by the heroines of "The medical examination diary: the exciting days of me and my senpai" and "The 2nd page of the medical examination diary: Another story of exciting days of me and my senpai".
data.supported_languages:
英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 日文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit, Windows 11 (Windows RT and 10 Mobile are not supported)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i Processor Series (Low Voltage Processor is not supported)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD Graphics 620
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: A sound card that supports DirectSound
  • 備註: A pointing device required
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 64bit, Windows 11 (Windows RT and 10 Mobile are not supported)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i Processor Series (Low Voltage Processor is not supported)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GT 1030
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: A sound card that supports DirectSound
  • 備註: A pointing device required

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 64bit, Windows 11 (Windows RT and 10 Mobile are not supported)
  • Processor: Intel Core i Processor Series (Low Voltage Processor is not supported)
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: HD Graphics 620
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
  • Sound Card: A sound card that supports DirectSound
  • Additional Notes: A pointing device required
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 64bit, Windows 11 (Windows RT and 10 Mobile are not supported)
  • Processor: Intel Core i Processor Series (Low Voltage Processor is not supported)
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce GT 1030
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
  • Sound Card: A sound card that supports DirectSound
  • Additional Notes: A pointing device required
